data.name: Survivor these Girls
data.detailed_description:
準備好迎接你一生中最瘋狂的彈幕地獄吧

🔥 準備好迎接你人生中最「火辣」的彈幕地獄吧！

在《誘惑獵人》中，你將操控Kael——一位疲憊、薪水低微又倒霉的獵人，踏上一場真正地獄級的任務：穿越被性感惡魔生物佔領的領地。她們不只想要你的靈魂……她們要的是整套服務。

在這裡，怪物穿高跟鞋、聲音撩人，對帥哥獵人（或至少是單身的）饑渴難耐。忘了劍與戰吼吧：這款遊戲裡，你將面對情話連連、挑逗騷擾、致命之吻，以及會讓你變慢……又變熱的嘲諷。

讓那些老闆們認清自己的位置

😈 女魔王們（以及她們的「魅力」）：

🔮 孤獨的梅杜莎 – 她孤居於禁忌森林中，寂寞又危險地迷人。她的眼神能將男人變成石頭——尤其是那些盯太久……或根本不懂撩妹的。

🩸 慾望吸血鬼瓦萊莉亞 – 別只以為她要吸血。她渴望的是更濃、更熱、更有生命的東西。靠近她卻不動的話，就等於邀請她將你吸乾——以最棒，也最糟的方式。

🙏 罪孽修女卡蜜拉 – 被慾望惡魔附身後，她放棄了貞潔誓言，轉而進行另一種「靈修」。每場驅魔儀式，都是呻吟與禁忌快感的混合秀。

🔥 淘氣魅魔莉莉安娜 – 她精通幻術、性癖與心理戰。如果Kael眨一下眼，遊戲就結束；如果他碰了她……嗯，這就不劇透了。

👑 阿斯莫迪雅，快樂魔后 – 地獄與慾望的至尊女王。她要Kael當她的永恆情人——或者至少當她床上的玩具。三階段、三宗罪，一個無法忘懷的結局。

🎮 遊戲玩法：

靈感來自《Survivors》類型，主打輕鬆上手、簡單移動與直覺技能。遊戲節奏快速、重點明確、笑料不斷。沒有複雜配裝或深度劇情——讓你沉迷的，是色氣滿滿的畫面、挑逗的對話與各種荒謬場面。

每個關卡都充滿嘴砲連連的惡魔女孩、搞笑動畫與爆笑互動。要嘛通關……要嘛用風騷的姿勢投降。

成為怪物的女獵手

💋 性感亮點：

  • 女Boss個性鮮明，嘴巴壞得剛剛好

  • 劇情與動畫中塞滿了雙關、三關（或根本無關）笑點

  • 簡單上手的彈幕玩法——玩得開，擋不住

  • 辣味幽默、成人情節、荒謬又刺激的場面

  • 戰利品畫廊，收藏你征服過的每位「小姐姐」❤️

注意

本遊戲及商店頁面採用自動翻譯。

雖然遊戲內容不多，但部分翻譯可能不夠清楚，請留意。

我們已經努力運用回譯等方法來確保文字清晰，但若自動翻譯的限制對您造成困擾，建議不要購買。

data.short_description: 你是一位被性感惡魔、附身修女和飢渴吸血鬼包圍的獵人——她們可不只是想要你的靈魂。 活下去、戰鬥……或是甘願地投降吧。
data.supported_languages:
英文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 日文*, 俄文*, 烏克蘭文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DX11, DX12 capable
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Survivor these Girls
data.detailed_description:
🔥 Get ready for the naughtiest bullet hell of your life.

In Temptation Hunter, you control Kael, a tired, underpaid, and unlucky hunter who ends up on the most hellish mission possible: crossing territories overrun by sensual demonic creatures who don’t just want your soul... they want the whole package.

But here, the monsters wear high heels, have seductive voices, and an appetite for handsome hunters (or at least available ones). Forget swords and battle cries: in this game, you’ll face pick-up lines, heavy petting, deadly kisses, and taunts that make you slow down… and hot.

😈 The Bosses (and their “charms”):

🔮 Medusa, the Loner – She lives isolated in the forbidden forest, lonely and dangerously attractive. Her eyes turn men to stone — but only those who stare too long... or who have no game.

🩸 Valeria, the Lustful Vampire – Forget just blood. She wants something thicker, hotter, and more alive. Standing still near her is an invitation to be sucked dry — in the best and worst ways.

🙏 Sister Carmela, the Sinful Nun – Possessed by a lust demon, she replaced her vows of chastity with… other spiritual practices. Every exorcism is a session of moans and sacrilegiously indecent blows.

🔥 Lilliana, the Naughty Succubus – She masters illusions, fetishes, and mind games. If Kael blinks, it’s over. If Kael touches her... well, better not spoil it.

👑 Asmodeia, the Demonarch of Pleasure – The supreme queen of Hell and Desires. She wants Kael as her eternal consort — or at least as a bedroom toy. Three stages, three sins, one unforgettable ending.

🎮 Gameplay:

Inspired by Survivors, but focused on casual action, simple movement, and easy-to-use powers, the game offers a quick loop, straight to the point, and full of humor. No complex builds or deep lore — what keeps you hooked are the jokes, provocative visuals, and absurd moments.

Each stage is filled with hordes of monstrous girls with sarcastic lines, funny animations, and hilarious interactions. Survive the assault… or surrender in style.

💋 Seductive Highlights:

  • Female bosses with strong personalities, witty lines, and lots of mischief

  • Scenes and cutscenes full of double, triple (or no) entendres

  • Simple bullet hell-style gameplay — easy to play, hard to resist

  • Acid humor, adult content, and situations as absurd as they are exciting

  • A gallery with all your conquests—that is, girls—to visit and reminisce about the good times you had together.

Attention

This game and the store page use automatic translations.

Although the game has little text, some translations may not be clear. Please keep this in mind.

We strive to make the content as clear as possible, checking it through back-translations and other methods. However, if the limitations of automatic translation are a concern, we recommend not purchasing.

data.short_description: You’re a hunter surrounded by sexy demons, possessed nuns, and thirsty vampires — and they’re not just after your soul. Survive, fight… or surrender with pleasure.
data.supported_languages:
English, Portuguese - Brazil, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Polish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Spanish - Latin America, Japanese*, Russian*, Ukrainian*
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 64bit
  • Processor: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DX11, DX12 capable
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
